mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.CAFE_NAME, R.ROOM_ID, R.ROOM_NAME, RG.GENRE_NAME, R.ROOM_IMG, R.IS_ADULT, R.CREATED_AT, ( SELECT AVG(RV.SATISFACTION) FROM REVIEW RV JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RV.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RES ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RES.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RES.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON PR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID WHERE RO.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID ) AS AVG_GRADE FROM ROOM R JOIN ROOM_GENRE RG ON R.GENRE_ID = RG.GENRE_ID JOIN CAFE C ON R.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID ) ORDER BY AVG_GRADE DESC NULLS LAST, CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY

SELECT VAP.PARTY_ID, VAP.PARTY_NAME , C.CAFE_NAME, R.ROOM_NAME , TO_CHAR(RO.OPEN_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS OPEN_AT , ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(TEMP),1) FROM VW_PARTY_ACTIVE_MEMBER WHERE PARTY_ID = VAP.PARTY_ID ) AS AVG_TEMP , FN_MEMBER_COUNT(VAP.PARTY_ID) AS PARTY_CNT , R.MAX_PLAYERS FROM VW_ACTIVE_PARTY VAP JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON RO.RES_OPEN_ID = VAP.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM R ON RO.ROOM_ID = R.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE C ON R.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID ORDER BY VAP.CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY
